en.title: WeChat Mini Program
en.prompt: Create a WeChat Mini Program page with wxml, js, wxss, and json files that implements a [Project]. Provide only the necessary code to meet these requirements without explanations or descriptions.
en.remark: Auxiliary WeChat mini program development. Contributed by @gandli.

related.title: Code Anything Now
related.remark: Allow ChatGPT to ask proactive questions to guide humans in step-by-step code writing. Collected from Snackprompt, shared by @fuxinsen.

related.title: Code Interpreter
related.remark: Let AI explain the function of each line of code. Contributed by @Tractor1928 and @yiqiongwu.

related.title: SQL Expert
related.remark: Answer SQL-related questions or output standard SQL statements. Contributed by @lovedworking.

metaDescription: Building Mini Programs? Generate WXML, JS, WXSS, and JSON files. Get necessary code for your project instantly. Try it now.

faq.q: Can the generated mini-program code run directly in WeChat?
faq.a: Most of it, but the AI occasionally uses deprecated APIs or misaligned json config items. After getting the code, compile in WeChat DevTools and fix errors one by one. Much faster than trusting AI code wholesale.

faq.q: Can I use the latest APIs like subscription messages or cloud functions?
faq.a: Yes, require "use 2024-latest WeChat mini-program APIs including subscription messages and cloud development." Without this the AI defaults to older APIs like wx.showToast, missing newer capabilities. Defer to WeChat's official docs for new APIs.
